name: Chacon Autos
description_short: Chacon Autos is a Buy Here, Pay Here used car dealership operating since 1958 that provides in-house auto financing for buyers with bad or no credit.
description_long:
Chacon Autos is a Texas-based Buy Here, Pay Here (BHPH) used car dealership with roots going back to 1958, originally established serving the Dallas-Fort Worth area. Over the decades, the company expanded to multiple locations including Austin and San Antonio. They hold an A+ rating with the Better Business Bureau, which they state has been maintained since their founding. The company operates as both the seller and the financing entity, meaning they do not rely on third-party lenders to approve buyers.

Chacon Autos sells 1-to-5-year-old used vehicles including cars, trucks, SUVs, and crossovers. Their primary offering is in-house financing for customers who have damaged credit, limited credit history, or no credit at all. Most vehicles on their lots retain remaining factory warranties. The application process can be started entirely online, allowing prospective buyers to upload identification, import bank statements, and receive a pre-qualification decision before visiting a showroom.

What sets Chacon apart from traditional dealerships is their role as the financing company rather than a loan broker. This means credit decisions are made internally, removing the dependency on banks or credit unions that typically reject subprime applicants. Their process is marketed as fast and low-friction — multiple customer testimonials on the site describe leaving with a vehicle the same day. Hours run Monday through Saturday with Sunday closures.

Chacon Autos is genuinely useful for Texas consumers who have exhausted conventional auto financing options. However, as is typical of BHPH dealerships, interest rates on in-house financing are generally higher than market rates — the website discloses no APR figures, which is a significant transparency gap for a consumer finance profile. The inventory is limited to used vehicles only, and geographic reach is confined to Texas. Shoppers who qualify for traditional financing would likely find better terms elsewhere.
address: 1400 SE Military Dr, San Antonio, TX 78214

company_info.headquarters: 1400 SE Military Dr, San Antonio, TX 78214

pros: In-house financing means no third-party bank approval — credit decisions made on-site
Serves customers with bad credit and no credit history every day
A+ BBB rating maintained continuously since 1958 founding
Most vehicles retain remaining factory warranties
Fully digital pre-qualification: bank statement import and ID upload without visiting dealership
65+ years in business with multiple Texas locations (DFW, Austin, San Antonio)
Inventory limited to 1-5 year old vehicles — relatively recent used stock
cons: No APR or interest rate information disclosed anywhere on the website — typical BHPH rates are significantly above market
Financing is tied exclusively to vehicle purchase — cannot be used for other financial needs
Inventory restricted to used vehicles only; no new cars available
Geographic coverage limited to Texas (DFW, Austin, San Antonio areas)
Closed Sundays, limiting access for weekend-only shoppers
best_for: Consumers with damaged or no credit history who have been denied by traditional dealerships
Texas residents in the DFW, Austin, or San Antonio areas needing immediate vehicle access
First-time car buyers without established credit
Buyers who want a used vehicle with remaining factory warranty under flexible approval criteria
diagnosis: Chacon Autos is best suited for Texas consumers with poor or no credit who need a vehicle and have been turned away by banks or franchise dealerships. The main caveat is that Buy Here, Pay Here financing almost universally carries high interest rates — and Chacon discloses no rate information on their site — so borrowers should be prepared for above-market financing costs in exchange for the accessibility.
services: Buy Here, Pay Here in-house auto financing
Digital bank statement import for application
Online ID upload and remote processing
Used car, truck, SUV, and crossover sales
Vehicle inspection and detailing prior to sale
In-person financing at multiple Texas locations
